raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"brand","confidence":0.87,"matched_text":"Nikwax is a well-known and trusted brand in the outdoor industry, and their products are widely used by outdoor enthusiasts and boot owners.","distilled_fact":"Nikwax is a well-known and trusted brand in the outdoor industry."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_usage_guidance","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"Every 2-3 months if you wear your boots daily in moderate weather conditions.","distilled_fact":"Nikwax Tech Wash or other waterproofing sprays may need to be reapplied every 2-3 months when boots are worn daily in moderate weather conditions."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_usage_guidance","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"Every 1-2 months if you wear your boots frequently in harsh weather conditions.","distilled_fact":"Nikwax Tech Wash or other waterproofing sprays may need to be reapplied every 1-2 months when boots are worn frequently in harsh weather conditions."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_usage_guidance","confidence":0.92,"matched_text":"Every 6-12 months if you wear your boots occasionally in mild weather conditions.","distilled_fact":"Nikwax Tech Wash or other waterproofing sprays may need to be reapplied every 6-12 months when boots are worn occasionally in mild weather conditions."}]}
